message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontStyle italic
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor #333333
skinparam classFontColor #333333
skinparam interfaceBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam interfaceBorderColor #333333
skinparam interfaceFontColor #333333
skinparam stereotypeCBackgroundColor #90EE90
skinparam stereotypeCBorderColor #333333
skinparam stereotypeCFontColor #333333
skinparam stereotypeABackgroundColor #ADD8E6
skinparam stereotypeABorderColor #333333
skinparam stereotypeAFontColor #333333
skinparam stereotypeIBackgroundColor #D8BFD8
skinparam stereotypeIBorderColor #333333
skinparam stereotypeIFontColor #333333

class "Personnage" as Personnage <<A>> {
    void combattre()
    void setArme(ComportementArme)
}

class "Menu" as Menu <<C>> {
    void main(String)
}

interface "ComportementArme" as ComportementArme <<I>> {
    void utiliserArme()
}

class "Chevalier" as Chevalier <<C>>
class "Reine" as Reine <<C>>
class "Roi" as Roi <<C>>
class "Troll" as Troll <<C>>

class "ComportementArc" as ComportementArc <<C>> {
    void utiliserArme()
}

class "ComportementEpee" as ComportementEpee <<C>> {
    void utiliserArme()
}

class "ComportementPoignard" as ComportementPoignard <<C>> {
    void utiliserArme()
}

Personnage --> "1" ComportementArme
Chevalier --|> Personnage
Reine --|> Personnage
Roi --|> Personnage
Troll --|> Personnage

ComportementArc ..|> ComportementArme
ComportementEpee ..|> ComportementArme
ComportementPoignard ..|> ComportementArme

@enduml
